programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An Andrew Clemens sand bottle circa 1885; a 1933 Goudey baseball card set 239/240; a Joan Miró pencil on paper circa 1965.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby delves into the history of Midsomer Mere after a series of murders take place.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When Mike mysteriously leaves Brokenwood on other police business, Kristin leads the inquiry into a 1970s-themed party where several partygoers turn up dead.

programme.title: Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Rockers Pat Benatar and Neil Giraldo present a career-spanning hour of classic rock hits including "Heartbreaker," "We Belong" and "Love Is a Battlefield.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Rebecca Hall and Lee Daniels research their family histories.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An Andrew Clemens sand bottle circa 1885; a 1933 Goudey baseball card set 239/240; a Joan Miró pencil on paper circa 1965.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby delves into the history of Midsomer Mere after a series of murders take place.

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Murders occur when a British food corporation signs a secret agreement with the Nazis to provide essential food services to the enemy during wartime.

programme.title: Wowsabout
programme.desc: Ronald, a meticulous, rule-following pig, and Roxy, a free-spirited musical hedgehog, explore the "wows" of one of America's most extraordinary places -- Sequoia National Park.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Everett's Swim Lesson; Miss Emmaline's New Beginning
programme.desc: Everett faces his fear of water by taking a swimming lesson; Lyla doesn't want Miss Emmaline to move.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: Alma Goes to Puerto Rico; Bomba on the Beach
programme.desc: When Alma and her family travel to Puerto Rico to visit Papi's family, Alma can't wait to dance Bomba on the beach; her dancing plans are put on hold when an unmarked package containing a beautiful Bomba skirt is dropped in front of her bisabuela.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: World's Greatest Playdate; What Alma Wants
programme.desc: Alma gets jealous when Rafia and Lucas talk about their fun playdate; Alma can't decide if she wants to see a new movie.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Rebecca Hall and Lee Daniels research their family histories.

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: As war breaks out, translator Harry Chase vows to help his Polish lover Kasia flee Warsaw, but does not know how to explain this to his sweetheart Lois, who is waiting for him at home in Manchester.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: A month after the war begins, Warsaw, Poland, is destroyed; Harry longs for news; Kasia joins the Polish resistance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Tom fights for his life on board the HMS Exeter; Harry and Lois have a more personal battle to fight.

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Harry's courage is tested at Louvain; Kasia's resistance activity in Warsaw intensifies.

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Harry leads his unit on the route to Dunkirk, and they fight to make it onto the beach and aboard a ship; Grzegorz and Tom also struggle to survive the chaos of the evacuation.

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: The Nazis have taken Paris in June 1940; Webster and Albert's life in the city they love will never be the same.

programme.title: World on Fire on Masterpiece
programme.desc: On a Polish mission as part of the Special Operations Executive, Harry grasps a second chance at saving Kasia from the horrors of Warsaw.

programme.title: Grandma Stand
programme.desc: Grandmothers sit behind a lemonade-style stand in New York's Central Park, offering heartfelt life lessons to passersby.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: Peter Baker, The New York Times; Susan Glasser, The New Yorker; Idrees Kahloon, The Atlantic; Ashley Parker, The Atlantic.

programme.title: Compass Points From PBS News
programme.desc: Experts analyze prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world.

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle's investigation of the death of a young Black marketeer is interrupted by his suspension on charges of sedition.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new cohort of junior doctors join the midwives, including Timothy, who observes the contrast between clinical medicine and compassionate care at Nonnatus House; Violet announces her plan to shadow the midwives.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: MaryLand on Masterpiece
programme.desc: When sisters Becca and Rosaline receive shocking news about their mother, they fly to the Isle of Man to find out more and are reunited in their sorrow after years of distance.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond locates Gaston, Villefort's illegitimate child, who has grown up to be a thief; Danglars discovers Fernand's treacherous deeds in Algeria and reveals all to the press.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days on Masterpiece
programme.desc: In the Old West, the three adventurers meet a lawman with a captive fugitive, and making their next train connection hinges on Abigail.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin wants to check out insects, while Chris would rather investigate the spider monkey.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The kids learn what colors make up a rainbow just in time for a Mother's Day surprise.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Finding a New Friend; Lyla Bugs Out
programme.desc: Lyla and her sisters find a lost bag's owner; Lyla gets jealous when Ale gets attention.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: A Collection to Get Rid of; The Button Collection
programme.desc: Carl and his friends clean up the Fuzzytown Park; Carl accidentally breaks the birthday present Sheldon planned to give his mom.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel's Tiger Twirl; You Can Play Your Own Way
programme.desc: Miss Elaina shows off her cartwheel at the carnival, prompting Daniel to try it, too.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.sub-title: Birthday Dance Surprise; The Green Pepper
programme.desc: Phoebe plans a birthday surprise for Grandma; Phoebe and Jay must tend to the bell pepper in the garden.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys, so his friends make a movie to show that sharing can be fun.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Sammys Primmo; Sammy Makes a Day
programme.desc: Sammy and Benito find a way to communicate; Sammy makes plans for his mom's visit.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.desc: Donkey makes Grampy a special card but she gets into a few sticky situations when she tries to deliver it to him; the pals help Harriett with her new invention for penguins.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: Purple Sweet Potato Buns; Tia's Big Break
programme.desc: Rosie, Jun and Grandpa Liu go to the Asian Market to buy more sweet potato buns; Rosie and Javi help Tia overcome her stage fright when she goes on a television cooking show.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: The kids learn about crying as they set out on an adventure to help Miri; the kids and Mr. Bat look for Ari's ball after it goes missing in a cave.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: The Missing Vote; Alma's Lemonade and Everything Else Stand
programme.desc: Alma and her friends must vote for either a new board game or art supplies; Alma and Harper open a lemonade stand.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: A family of beavers builds a dam that accidentally diverts water into Trini's garden, threatening her strawberries; Trini is determined to earn the Night Watchers Badge.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Rukmini Devi; I Am Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rukmini Devi reminds Xavier and Yadina why their annual family walk is special; Bob Ross shows Yadina that a small blunder can be a happy accident.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An Andrew Clemens sand bottle circa 1885; a 1933 Goudey baseball card set 239/240; a Joan Miró pencil on paper circa 1965.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Exploring the unique evolutionary journey of woodpeckers and the role they play in every ecosystem, except Antarctica and Australia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Macgillivray Freeman's Everest
programme.desc: Follows the expedition of four climbers on their journey to the summit of Everest, just days after eight climbers lost their lives in a deadly storm.

programme.title: Life Unearthed With Ariel Waldman
programme.desc: Set in Antarctica's Dry Valleys, Antarctica's glacial and icy ecosystems reveal how frozen landscapes can sustain surprising life forms.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Clint Eastwood: The Last Legend
programme.desc: Exploring the work of Clint Eastwood through films including "The Good, the Bad and the Ugly," "Million Dollar Baby," "Mystic River" and "Gran Torino.".

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1960 Ansel Adams Portfolio III: Yosemite Valley; a Persian Qashqai Gabbeh rug circa 1935; 1959 JFK's boxer shorts with signed photo.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: The French-American alliance changes the war and moves it to other theaters; navies battle off England and in the Caribbean, while armies advance in Indian Country and the South; the British take Charleston.
